# Parse PDF
**ID:** parsePdf  
**Type:** Atomic  
**Level:** IV  
**Rarity:** Common  
**Status:** Provisional

---

## Description
Extracts text, tables, equations, and structure from PDF documents, preserving layout and reading order.

## Prerequisites
_None._

## Unlocks
- [Document Digitization](../composite/documentDigitization.md)
